This week on **agent-office** (Apr 13 ‚Üí 18). All on `main`; bench harness work is currently uncommitted.

**Foundations (Apr 13)** ‚Äî landed the four phase commits in one day: Phase 1 foundation (`bd59458`), Phase 2 agent core / personas / launcher (`6a1ede2`), Phase 3 memory engine with domain-scoped queries + injector (`ca066d7`), Phase 4 React office UI with animated scene (`eaebe7c`).

**Engine extraction + office canvas (Apr 14)** ‚Äî broke `pixel-agents` into typed engine modules (`a88a3c6`‚Ä¶`fd62f21`), wired the 25√ó20 office with 7 themed zones (`a4ef81e`), swapped the CSS scene for `OfficeCanvas` (`6ac04c0`), and shipped Phase 4.5/4.6: claude-mem SQLite read-adapter (`d109f26`), persona‚Üíobservation heuristic filter (`e079b4f`), `LaunchPreview` + iTerm2 tab spawning (`64ed75e`, `27cb1d3`, `c0f0d86`), merged via `6b61356`.

**Telemetry + launch redesign (Apr 15)** ‚Äî Phase 5 telemetry dashboard (`2534692`/`3199451`), provider adapters + portfolio stats (`4d9806d`), provider-aware launch picker (`42aab52`), local skill roots (`a4cb528`).

**Provider-neutral history + polish (Apr 16)** ‚Äî added provider-neutral project history ingestion (`9c4afb4`), `doctor` command (`3b9f1a9`), live-session presence fixes (`a8f6bd4`, `aaa47ed`), Codex history enrichment (`fc03de3`).

**Memory brief + LaunchWizard (Apr 18)** ‚Äî persona-scoped brief generator (`4d9a58a`), bench harness for brief vs raw-memory token savings (`40c5014`), wired persona brief into live launch (`17bf243`) and LaunchPreview (`ec56fb9`), dropped the claude-mem fallback in favor of unified memory stats + semantic search (`2dbef00`, `3c1cf94`), and collapsed ProjectPicker + LaunchPreview into a single 4-step `LaunchWizard` modal (`3b6c0b4`). Also: Playwright LinkedIn carousel capture (`01f2a70`), floor simplified to Boss/Workspace/Dungeon + Fixer (`d5da889`), README rewrite around the unified-memory USP (`18e1cbb`).

**Uncertain / in flight** ‚Äî `bench/` and `scripts/bench-whitepaper.mjs` are untracked (not committed). Memory notes S291 and obs 3718‚Äì3729 describe a 3-task √ó 10-turn whitepaper benchmark design (tasks, judge rubric, `bench-whitepaper.mjs` runner) authored today, but I haven't verified whether any of it has been executed end-to-end ‚Äî only that the files exist in the working tree.
